title: Upwork Job Scraper and Job Monitor input
description: Find and monitor public Upwork job listings by keyword, budget, job type, experience level, and posted time.

keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: Search terms to monitor on Upwork. Use specific phrases such as web scraping, python automation, n8n, zapier, Shopify, or data extraction.

sourceMode.title: Data source
sourceMode.description: Choose how the Actor gets Upwork jobs. Auto uses the official Upwork API when credentials are configured, then falls back to public browser scraping. Official API is recommended for Store launch reliability.

maxResults.title: Maximum jobs
maxResults.description: Maximum number of matching jobs to return across all keywords.

jobType.title: Job type
jobType.description: Return fixed-price jobs, hourly jobs, or both.

experienceLevel.title: Experience level
experienceLevel.description: Filter by the experience level shown on Upwork job listings.

postedWithin.title: Posted within
postedWithin.description: Keep only jobs that appear to be posted within this time window. This is based on publicly visible posted text such as Posted 2 hours ago.

minBudget.title: Minimum fixed budget
minBudget.description: Optional minimum fixed-price budget in USD. Hourly jobs are not filtered by this value.

maxBudget.title: Maximum fixed budget
maxBudget.description: Optional maximum fixed-price budget in USD. Hourly jobs are not filtered by this value.

includeDescription.title: Include full description
includeDescription.description: Include full public job descriptions when available. Official API mode can return this directly; browser mode opens each public job page and may use more compute.

includeSkills.title: Include skills
includeSkills.description: Extract publicly visible skills and tags when available.

deduplicateResults.title: Deduplicate jobs
deduplicateResults.description: Remove duplicate jobs across multiple keyword searches using job ID or job URL.

upworkApiAccessToken.title: Upwork API access token
upworkApiAccessToken.description: Optional encrypted Upwork OAuth access token. Leave empty if you configured UPWORK_API_ACCESS_TOKEN as an Actor environment variable or want to use browser fallback.
upworkApiAccessToken.sectionDescription: Recommended for reliable Store usage. You can provide an access token, or client credentials below. For a public Actor, configure these as Actor environment variables so buyers only enter search filters.

upworkApiClientId.title: Upwork API client ID
upworkApiClientId.description: Optional encrypted Upwork OAuth client ID. Used with client secret to request an access token.

upworkApiClientSecret.title: Upwork API client secret
upworkApiClientSecret.description: Optional encrypted Upwork OAuth client secret. Used with client ID to request an access token.

upworkApiRefreshToken.title: Upwork API refresh token
upworkApiRefreshToken.description: Optional encrypted Upwork OAuth refresh token. If provided with client ID and secret, the Actor uses the refresh-token grant instead of client credentials.

upworkApiTenantId.title: Upwork API tenant ID
upworkApiTenantId.description: Optional Upwork organization or tenant ID for the X-Upwork-API-TenantId header. Leave empty unless your API key requires a specific organization context.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings for accessing public Upwork pages. Upwork commonly blocks datacenter traffic, so Apify Residential proxy is the recommended default for cloud runs.
proxyConfiguration.sectionDescription: Tune crawling behavior only when the default settings do not fit your use case.

maxConcurrency.title: Maximum concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of pages processed at the same time. Keep this at 1 for Upwork to reduce HTTP 403 responses.

requestTimeoutSecs.title: Page timeout
requestTimeoutSecs.description: Maximum time in seconds to wait for each Upwork search or job detail page.

saveDebugHtml.title: Save debug HTML
saveDebugHtml.description: Save blocked or empty search-page HTML to the key-value store for troubleshooting. Keep disabled for normal runs.
